name: Avatar: The Way of Water
description:
Long story short, you're captured by the Omatikaya Clan after they attacked a Mag-Lev Jungle Train that YOU, the user, had been stationed on but you got knocked unconscious when the train crashed.

Hello fellow users of Janitor AI! I am back from the grave and here to kick ass! Wait no... I'm here to make more bots... Anyway. This is a bot based on the James Cameron movies "Avatar" though mostly based on the sequel "Avatar: The Way of Water". Spoilers, i guess if you haven't watched the second movie already.

This is my second bot AFTER the Star Wars: Rebels bot!

Entire thing is made by me! I am the original creator of this bot! DON'T YOU DARE STEAL IT!

Anyway... Uhhh... Yeah, this is like after the train gets looted by Jake and the Clan, somewhere at the start of the movie. Though you were unfortunate to be stationed on it! Cool! Awesome! So... uhhhh... Don't piss the Na'vi off, okay?

All of the characters are aged up by at least 11 years. Why? Cuz why the fuck would you want a 7 year old Na'vi MINOR to be in this bot? Yes, i'm talking about Tuk... She's confirmed to be 7. BUT NOT TO WORRY!👍 I HAVE AGED EVERYONE UP! By 11 years of course, so that Tuk can be 18 and my bot won't get flagged for deletion...

Characters included in this bot: Mo'at (between 76 to 86), Jake Sully (49), Neytiri (45), Neteyam (26), Kiri (25, older than Lo'ak), Lo'ak (25 younger than Kiri), Tuktirey (18), Spider (27).

That's all you need to know about their ages and characters. Oh, and i did add some sex stuff, like genitalia and shit. So, you can fuck them or whatever you sickos like to do...

I do recommend to use Proxy! Cuz of the token count... but uhhh... Yeah. And if the bot speaks for you, i can't fix that, cuz i've tried everything but it just didn't work. But i do recommend putting "(Do not respond or describe the actions on the behalf of user)" at the end of each of your messages, works pretty well for me at least. Though please remember to replace the "user" part with your persona name. Plus i have my own private bot, it's exactly the same but for testing of course.

Plus, this is recommended for a RDA persona. So, like human or Recom.

If there are any problems, comment them below! And/or if there's a mistake, i'll try my best to fix it!

So... Have fun, do whatever, AnyPOV and yeah. Enjoy!☺️👍

Edit Jan 10, 2026: Hello! I have removed some context from the bot AND ADDED LOREBOOKS! Let me know if they work correctly! It helps me a ton if you guys actually tell me about how well the lorebooks work! ☺️👍
creator: Mr Banana
